Why can't people with braces manipulate gravity at will?  
The reason is that braces are tools that help control the movement of teeth, not a means to alter gravity.  
Braces work by applying force to guide teeth into proper positions, but they do not affect the fundamental forces of nature, including gravity.  
Each brace is designed to support and guide, not to manipulate.  
The underlying principle is that braces are mechanical aids, not magical devices.  
Braces are built to strengthen and align, not to override natural laws.  
The key is that braces are not tools of power, but of precision.  
Braces are not capable of manipulating gravity, as it is a natural force that cannot be changed by any object or device.  
Braces are not meant to override gravity, but to assist in its natural flow.  
Braces are not a source of power, but a tool for control.  
Braces are not a means to alter gravity, but to guide and support.
